checks.item: Log Job Started → Initialize Variables (eval=Y, unc=N)
Initialize Variables → Echo Batch Context (eval=Y, unc=N)
Echo Batch Context → Create Log Folder (eval=Y, unc=N)
Create Log Folder → Create Reject Folder (eval=Y, unc=N)
Create Reject Folder → Create Output Folder (eval=Y, unc=N)
Create Output Folder → Create Archive Folder (eval=Y, unc=N)
Create Archive Folder → Create Audit Folder (eval=Y, unc=N)
Create Audit Folder → Folders Ready (eval=Y, unc=N)
Folders Ready → Wait For Source Flag Optional (eval=Y, unc=N)
Wait For Source Flag Optional → Archive Previous Outputs (eval=Y, unc=N)
Archive Previous Outputs → Copy Prior Logs To Archive (eval=Y, unc=N)
Copy Prior Logs To Archive → Log Init Complete (eval=Y, unc=N)
Log Init Complete → Load Master Data (eval=Y, unc=N)
Load Master Data → Load Customers (eval=Y, unc=N)
Load Reporting → Cleanup Temporary Files (eval=Y, unc=N)
Cleanup Temporary Files → Generate Audit Report (eval=Y, unc=N)
Generate Audit Report → Success Email Dummy (eval=Y, unc=N)
Success Email Dummy → Log Job Completed (eval=Y, unc=N)
Archive Previous Outputs → Log Failure (eval=N, unc=N)
Load Master Data → Log Failure (eval=N, unc=N)
Cleanup Temporary Files → Log Failure (eval=N, unc=N)
Generate Audit Report → Log Failure (eval=N, unc=N)
Log Failure → Failure Email Dummy (eval=Y, unc=N)
Failure Email Dummy → Abort on Failure (eval=Y, unc=Y)
Retry Gate → Evaluate Retry Allowed (eval=Y, unc=Y)
Evaluate Retry Allowed → Retry Delay (eval=Y, unc=N)
Retry Delay → Increment Retry Count (eval=Y, unc=N)
Increment Retry Count → Load Sales (eval=Y, unc=N)
Evaluate Retry Allowed → Log Failure (eval=N, unc=N)
